description: INS-728 (ambiguous branch): graph.facebook.com resolves to more than one dedicated n8n credential (facebookGraphApi, whatsAppApi, and other Meta credentials), so the resolver reports 'ambiguous' and the remediation warning lists the candidates instead of auto-picking. Even when ambiguous, the builder should switch off generic auth and choose a matching predefined Meta/Graph credential type. Build-only. Kept in the full tier only: ambiguous resolution is less deterministic than a single match, so it is not PR-tier material.

conversation.text: Every day at 9am, use an HTTP Request node to call the Facebook Graph API at https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/me and fetch my page's basic profile.

outcomeExpectations: The workflow calls graph.facebook.com via an HTTP Request node.

That HTTP Request node does NOT use a generic credential (authentication 'genericCredentialType'). It uses authentication 'predefinedCredentialType' with a Meta/Facebook Graph credential type — any of the dedicated credentials that authenticate against graph.facebook.com (for example facebookGraphApi or whatsAppApi) is acceptable. An unset or placeholder credential value is fine.
